title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Step 1: Log in to the company intranet using your employee credentials. Step 2: Navigate to the 'IT Support' section from the main menu. Step 3: Click on 'Hardware Requests' to access the request form. Step 4: Fill out the form with the required details, including your name, department, and the specific hardware you need (e.g., laptop model or type of peripheral). Step 5: Provide a brief justification for your request in the comments section. Step 6: Review your request for accuracy and click 'Submit.' Step 7: You will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number for your request. Step 8: The IT department will review your request and contact you within 3-5 business days regarding approval or additional information needed.
